name: Impossible Coconut Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a pie plate, 9-inch or 10-inch.
3. In a blender container, combine all ingredients.
4. Cover and blend on High for 15 seconds.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie plate.
6. Bake until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, about 50 to 55 minutes.
7. Allow to cool.
